name: Abstract Botanical — Warm Grey Taupe
palette: Warm grey, taupe, muted mauve on cream-white ground
bestFor: Living room, bedroom, hallway — contemporary warm interiors
keyStrength: Warm neutral palette matches walnut/travertine panels perfectly. Abstract botanical form is gender-neutral, season-neutral, trend-proof. Walnut frame ties directly to wood veneer assortment.
keyWeakness: May read too subtle for maximalist or heritage-leaning spaces

name: Misty Mountain Reflection — B&W Photography
style: Black & white landscape photography — mirrored mountain lake
palette: Greyscale — deep blacks, misty whites, full tonal range
bestFor: Living room feature, home office, bedroom — dramatic minimal interiors
bestSegments: Design Millennials · Aspirational Pro · Corporate / Commercial
keyStrength: High-contrast B&W creates instant drama on any wall. Black frame pairs with dark stone panels. Mirrored symmetry composition adds sophistication.
keyWeakness: Cool/monochrome tone may clash with warm-only palettes

name: Round Wall Mirror — Walnut Frame
style: Large round mirror, slim walnut wood frame
bestFor: Foyer, bathroom vanity, bedroom, living room accent
keyStrength: Walnut frame directly pairs with walnut veneer panels — creates material continuity. Round form softens angular panel walls. Universally functional (foyer, vanity, bedroom). Large size makes statement without art commitment.
keyWeakness: Requires adequate wall space; round form less formal than rectangular for traditional interiors

name: Arched Wall Mirror — Brass Frame
style: Tall arched mirror, slim brushed brass/gold frame
frame: Brushed brass/gold metal, slim arch profile (~12mm)
bestFor: Foyer statement, bedroom dressing, bathroom vanity, living room accent
bestSegments: Aspirational Pro · Heritage Buyers · Design Millennials
keyStrength: Arched form is the #1 trending mirror shape in Indian interiors 2024–26. Brass frame echoes the copper/gold hardware trend and pairs with warm travertine stone panels. Portrait orientation makes spaces feel taller.
keyWeakness: Brass tone may clash with chrome/silver hardware; arch form too trendy for conservative buyers
